campaign.title: Papilio demoleus blind Flickr audit
campaign.description: A 49-owner, rights-verified blind audit of machine-screened Flickr search hypotheses. Human outcomes are not pre-populated.

strata.label: Flickr owner audit · abstention · other geo
strata.selectionNotes: Seeded equal-probability owner-group sample; one media observation per photographer. Zero-take strata are outside this bounded campaign and authorize no estimate.

selection.estimand: The rights-eligible, successfully joined, owner-canonical Flickr hypotheses in the pinned BioMiner pilot population. It is not all Flickr, all butterflies, or an occurrence set.
selection.ownerPartitionRule: Assign each owner first to no-usable-geo when present, then historical machine abstention when present, otherwise to the seed-ranked screening/geography record; select one record per owner and owner groups within declared strata.

dimensionSemantics.raw_screening_score_band: Bands the historical raw top-1 model similarity at <0.6, 0.6–<0.8 and >=0.8; it is not a probability or human label.
dimensionSemantics.coverage: Compares the precision-supported Flickr cell with the selected baseline snapshot; unavailable comparison is not biological absence.
dimensionSemantics.zeroTake: A population dimension value received no selected owner group and authorizes no dimension-specific estimate.

provenance.historicalCacheDisclosure: The three historical screening inputs are local run outputs, not content at BioMiner HEAD. Their exact hashes are pinned; they assign review strata only and are not human truth.
